title: Chain Lightning damages from destroyed magic count

card.rawText: Inflict 5 damage to your primary creature. Then, destroy all magic cards on the field. For each magic card destroyed, inflict 5 damage to your opponent's primary creature.

effect.value: Inflict 5 damage to your primary creature. Then, destroy all magic cards on the field. For each magic card destroyed, inflict 5 damage to your opponent's primary creature.

plan.title: Chain Lightning damages from destroyed magic count
plan.summary: Play Chain Lightning with field magic present and verify printed self-damage, destroy-all, and opponent damage expectations.

notes: Read text first: inflict 5 damage to your primary, destroy all magic, then inflict 5 damage to opponent primary for each magic destroyed.

steps: Inspect both primary creatures and destroyed field magic.

expectedAssertions.label: Self primary takes the printed 5 damage cost/effect
Opponent primary takes 5 per destroyed magic card

manualVerification: Confirm the opponent damage scales with every magic card destroyed, including both players field magic.
riskNotes: This fixture is expected to catch current gaps if self-damage or destroyed-count scaling is not implemented.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Play Chain Lightning with field magic present and verify printed self-damage, destroy-all, and opponent damage expectations.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
